choices.text: Legal milestone: owner can use building for intended purpose. Triggers warranty + stops liquidated damages + releases retention.
Cost-plus until ceiling; contractor absorbs overruns; underruns may be shared. Common in CMAR.
Design-Build: single entity, parallel design + construction, single accountability, faster delivery, GMP at concept. Tradeoff: less independent oversight.
Responsible (does work), Accountable (one final authority), Consulted (input), Informed (kept in loop). Per task; clarifies ownership.
Liquidated damages ($1k-100k+/day late penalty) + retention (5-10% withheld until substantial completion) + lien waivers (legal). All written in contract.
